name: Cadana
description: Developer of an instant pay platform designed to help workers get paid on demand. The company's platform offers facilities like instant transfers and flexible destination options and allows users to pay for any unexpected expenses, enabling companies to hire and pay people.

name: Clockster
description: Developer of staff management platform designed to offer a time and attendance management system for employees. The company's platform offers a cloud-based system in the form of a biometric-based clock-in device to focus on shift management, attendance, salary calculations, communications, and tasks, enabling food and beverage and retail industry enterprises to manage attendance and automate payroll, scheduling, business routines and save time.

name: Fintor
description: Operator of a fractional real estate investing platform intended to offer a simpler, smarter, and more reliable way to invest money. The company's software allows individual real estate investors or bigger real estate development firms to list their properties and give people the opportunity to buy shares, enabling investors to invest in the real estate markets.

name: GoatChat AI - Adaptive Plus Inc.
description: Developer of an e-commerce store maker app intended to help businesses launch an online store. The company's platform offers a variety of features, such as a drag-and-drop editor, customizable templates, and integrated payment processing, enabling small businesses to create and manage their own online stores easily.

name: Neon
description: Provider of bill payment technology intended to pay bills on flexible terms and conditions. The company's application facilitates payments for various services including rent bills, electricity bills, water bills, internet bills, and parking bills and also can add bills on the application and it automatically pays every bill, every month using a credit line and sends regular updates, enabling individuals to simplify their monthly bill payments and make them consistent.

name: Blocto
description: Developer of dApp browser Blocto. The company aims to bring block chain usage to the masses through its seamless dApp browser Blocto, enabling users to purchase and utilize crypto assets.

name: InfuseAI
description: Provider of a low-code platform intended to create machine learning models. The company's MLOps platform provides cluster-computing, one-click research environments, dataset loading, and management of various resources and access-control services for machine learning models, enabling data scientists to stay informed and focused on training and running their models. The platform gives IT leaders flexibility and administration authority to configure resources and settings for their teams.

name: Ambition
description: Developer of a personal development application intended to help in achieving dreams. The company's platform has various programs to inspire, educate and equip users with multiple life skills, enabling customers to reach their ambitions.

name: CYBAVO
description: Operator of a crypto custody firm intended to provide advanced digital asset custody by developing a custom operating system. The company provides blockchain security solutions via a patented encryption technology, and a highly secure sandboxed environment to deliver its suite of solutions, thereby helping clients easily manage digital assets and prevent malicious attacks, theft, and loss.
